---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ArchMIE
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### 📝 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### 💡 Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

### 🎯 Use Case
Describe the specific use case or scenario where this feature would be helpful.

### 📋 Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of the feature:
- How should it work?
- Where should it be located in the UI?
- What options/settings should it have?

### 🎨 Mockups/Screenshots (Optional)
If you have mockups, wireframes, or examples, please include them here.

### 🔧 Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.

### 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

### ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with ArchMIE's goals
- [ ] I have provided sufficient detail
- [ ] I have considered the complexity of implementation
